privileged_info_summary: The task queries the MedinTux DrTuxTest demo database (a real, open-source French medical practice management system). The fchpat table contains patient records with birth dates (FchPat_Nee) and sex (FchPat_Sexe) columns. Database connection: root user with empty password on localhost. Expected outputs are age_pyramid.png and age_data.csv in ~/Documents/. The core data source is the official MedinTux demo database, though task setup may supplement with synthetic patient data if the initial count is below 50 records.
